nasb.text: for this reason I did not even consider myself worthy to come to You, but just say the word, and my servant will be healed.

esv.text: Therefore I did not presume to come to you. But say the word, and let my servant be healed.

cnv.text: 我也覺得沒有資格去見你；只要你說一句話，我的僕人就必好了。

ccb.text: 我自认不配见你的面，只要你一句话，我的奴仆必定康复。

csbs.text: 我自己也觉得不配到你那里去。只要你说一句话，我的仆人就会痊愈的。
